Nagyobb frissességet ad, és kiváló tisztaságérzetet biztosít még alacsonyabb hőmérsékleten történő mosásnál is. A gyors oldódási technológiának köszönhetően a por vízzel érintkezve azonnal aktiválódik, és mélyen behatol a szálakba már alacsony hőmérsékleten is. items.raw_desc: Kerékpár állvány MAX1 - hátsó, univerzális, 26 - 29", fekete:                Key Features of MAX1 Rear Universal Bike Stand 26 - 29", BlackAluminium alloy bodySize adjustment with extendable feetUpright for greater stabilityFor wheels 26"- 29"Non-slip end capWeight 263 gBike frame mounting:Mount on the left side of the rear structure in front of the foot. First unscrew the 4 Allen screws (M6 Allen No.5) and loosen the rear washer. Attach the stand to the rear structure, attach the washer from the other side and replace the 2 lower Allen screws and tighten lightly. Then position the upper strut with the clamp, insert the top 2 screws, position the stand accurately (check that the stand does not interfere with the rear wheel splash and the foot movement trajectory when pedalling) and tighten all 4 screws one by one. Then release the extendable foot on the folding leg of the stand and place it in the optimal position so that the bike stands on the stand by itself. Recommended to be installed in a professional service.
